content: Is this team good enough to speedrun arc 1?

fuck

i mean to say
I wouldnt give arachne the twins if ur plan is to speedrun

her final verdict lets you basically one shot everything
Yeah waitin 5 min before daily reset
also level up her skills

covenant

yes
love pizza stat
I just press recomend
well
i wouldnt recommend it
Yeah its the +cr and fleeting exhaust strike
id honestly prefer deus ex machina
yeah she also doesnt benefit from crit at all lol

depends on the unit
if it scales off damage dealt then yea
Alr ty
OI DID YOU USE THE REDEEM CODES?!
bro is going slightly insane
I just don't want them to miss out 😭
ikik
Ok noob here. How does Liz synergize with Arachne

Lowkey 
Dupe that Arachne
As much as you can
How many should I aim for?
<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996> 2 dupes makes her great, that 3rd dupe is just to increase her Pursuit stackage
<:Brown_think:1459080117308620996> But I find 5 stacks to be great
But you can always get 2 and Proto the 3rd <:pray:1356053116260454534>

I finally got Miryam 🥳 🥳 💖 

Any ideas for a team to put her on? I am using Ramona, Lotan, and Ogier in storymode and would prefer to not overlevel them. But I have the resources to invest in any other chars, so current level is no issue.

My first thought is Daffodil, Tulu and Faros for some poison and Str building
tulu kinda useless in a poison team, run murphy instead
i would also run agrippa or arachne (or thais, aigis etc) over daff
daff poison application doesnt work well unless you go all in on daff
Maybe Murphy, Thais, Agrippa?
And thanks! 😊
best poison comp i can make? wanna get into it for arc 2
Gdoll, Thais, Nymph
thais is keyflare bot?
mhm
as for last slot well.... i guess faint?
like you dont have any other poisoner
if you had Xu you would be set
or hell, Karen
i could get her from standard selector yea?
right wheels and covenants? + does karen want enlightenments and what cards do i lvl on her
don't look at gear and wheels. Can this work with no dupes?
new favorite team
realistically no
and who are the mandatory dupes for this
i saw the comp in the pinned comments but i guess 24 for sure wants dupes
idk about the others
daff and 24 want OE horla wants e1
what about this, idk who to use as 4th
nautila or gdoll could be 4th
but tawil also wants OE
OE is at 7 dupes right
3 basic +4
yes
mhm, i could only get tawil to +1 rn
You dont have to hard commit rn
You might find teams that suit your playstyle more
Arc2 units need way fewer dupes
i guess you saw my characters on the other channel, for now is this tawil team the best i can do? I mean for now i can clear story easily with it but cause story is easy for now
Your current team is fine are you in arv1 or 2
ch7
Shouldn't be an issue then
why is hameln running crit?
Cause my gear is cooked
I should see the builds somewhere
Is there a site?
cheri handbook

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:

## General Guide
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University 
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri
- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly

## Mode Specific
- [P-Dive Shortest Map Analysis](<https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1483756178340315216>) by Aurora

## Compendium
- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University

Hi everyone, sorry to be a bother, but i started playing the game yesterday and really enjoying the story and gamemode, but im still learing all the mechanics and hoew to play. I have been reading ans watching YT videos to try and see what would be the best option in terms of factions, so i can learn more easily to understand the game.
This is the team im using atm, and saw that the current banners arent worth going for?
still in chapter 3 and saving silver
tyvm for all the help you can offer 🙂
arachne is very worth going for
probably top 5 support
Would probably need to change 2 of my units so i could slide her in the team. I think we can only have 2 types of units from what i read online
Decisions decisions <:dead:1356082627509092372>
Tyvm for the feedback 🙏
tbf you dont have a real dps atm
Since im still in early stages i havent got any difficulty to progress
Thats maybe why i havent thought about it
Just afraid i spend Silver in the wrong banner and make mistakes
its really hard to brick your account in this game
From what im seeing its a very generous game
Been getting "general pool" currency left and right
yeah you get a ton throughout the story
Might go for that selectable banner where you czn choose 4 chars and Pick a good dps. But ill check arachne first and see what she can do
Tyvm again for all the help. Very appreciated
if you do thais and horla are a MUST select and the only real good arc 1 dps atm is ghelot or daffodil in combination with arachne
Noted 👌
